nodes.title: Starting Point: The Marsh Edge
nodes.info: Begin your walk here. The marshes offer a unique ecosystem where saltwater and freshwater meet.

nodes.title: Viewpoint: The Estuary
nodes.info: Look out over the water. From this vantage point, you can observe the local birdlife that calls the wetlands home.

nodes.title: Viewpoint: Muelle de las Carabelas
nodes.info: Through the clearing, catch a glimpse of the replicas of the Niña, Pinta, and Santa María docked nearby.

nodes.title: Destination: Monasterio de la Rábida
nodes.info: You have reached the end of the path with a clear view of the historic Franciscan monastery.
